ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the law enforcement agency that reported the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., domestic, eluding, theft/shoplifting) */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Location where the incident occurred (e.g., residence, business, police station) */,
  "location_address" TEXT /* Specific address where the incident occurred */,
  "officer_injuries" TEXT /* Injuries sustained by officers during the incident */,
  "video_footage" INTEGER /* Whether video footage of the incident is available */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each law enforcement agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the law enforcement agency */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the agency is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the agency */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agency */,
  "agency_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the law enforcement agency the officer belongs to */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "officer_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer (e.g., officer, sergeant) */,
  "officer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the officer */,
  "officer_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number assigned to the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_officers" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer involved in the incident */,
  "officer_injuries" TEXT /* Injuries sustained by the officer during the incident */,
  "officer_actions" TEXT /* Actions taken by the officer during the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., video footage, officer notes) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the document file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the document file (e.g., MP4, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_documents_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the incident report */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_versions_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_agency_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level granted to the user for the agency (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "agency_id")
)
